implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: AC-006: real BuildQueuedPayload construction with provenance + timestamps
AC-008: single logger.info call with LOG_PREFIX_QUEUE_BUILD-prefixed message
AC-011: pydantic ValidationError caught at tool boundary
AC-013: seam test — round-trip through BuildQueuedPayload.model_validate_json

completion_promises.criterion_text: src/jarvis/tools/dispatch.py exposes queue_build(feature_id: str, feature_yaml_path: str, repo: str, branch: str = "main", originating_adapter: str = "terminal", correlation_id: str | None = None, parent_request_id: str | None = None) -> str decorated with @tool(parse_docstring=True).
completion_promises.evidence: Defined queue_build in src/jarvis/tools/dispatch.py with the exact signature and @tool(parse_docstring=True) decorator. TestAC001SignatureAndDecorator (5 cases) verifies BaseTool instance, name, parameter list/order, defaults, and `str` return annotation via get_type_hints. Pre-verified by Coach in Turn 1 — unchanged in Turn 2.
Docstring pasted verbatim from docs/design/FEAT-JARVIS-002/contracts/API-tools.md §3.2. TestAC002Docstring verifies presence of all contractual phrases. Pre-verified by Coach in Turn 1.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Validates feature_id against ^FEAT-[A-Z0-9]{3,12}$; rejects invalid with `ERROR: invalid_feature_id — must match FEAT-XXX pattern, got <value>`.
completion_promises.evidence: _FEATURE_ID_PATTERN regex enforced at the boundary; rejected inputs return the documented string. TestAC003FeatureIdValidation parametrises 7 invalid + 1 valid case. Pre-verified by Coach in Turn 1.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Validates repo against ^[A-Za-z0-9._-]+/[A-Za-z0-9._-]+$; rejects invalid with `ERROR: invalid_repo — must be org/name format, got <value>`.
completion_promises.evidence: _REPO_PATTERN compiled with the documented regex; rejects with the exact ERROR string. TestAC004RepoValidation parametrises 6 invalid + 1 valid. Pre-verified by Coach in Turn 1.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Validates originating_adapter in {terminal, telegram, dashboard, voice-reachy, slack, cli-wrapper}; rejects other with `ERROR: invalid_adapter — <value> not in allowed list`.
completion_promises.evidence: _ALLOWED_ADAPTERS frozenset of the six values; rejects with the documented string. TestAC005AdapterValidation parametrises 5 invalid + all 6 allowed. (Turn 2: ALLOWED test attribute updated to ClassVar[set[str]] for ruff RUF012 compliance.) Pre-verified by Coach in Turn 1.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Constructs real BuildQueuedPayload with triggered_by="jarvis", originating_adapter=<value>, correlation_id=correlation_id or new_correlation_id(), requested_at=now_utc(), queued_at=now_utc().
completion_promises.evidence: BuildQueuedPayload instantiated with the listed fields, using _now_utc() (datetime.now(timezone.utc)) and new_correlation_id() when no caller-supplied id is given. TestAC006Ac007PayloadAndEnvelope round-trips via model_validate_json. Pre-verified by Coach in Turn 1.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Constructs real MessageEnvelope(source_id="jarvis", event_type=EventType.BUILD_QUEUED, correlation_id=..., payload=...).
completion_promises.evidence: MessageEnvelope built with source_id='jarvis', event_type=EventType.BUILD_QUEUED, correlation_id, payload=BuildQueuedPayload.model_dump(mode='json'). Seam test validates JSON round-trip. Pre-verified by Coach in Turn 1.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Emits exactly one logger.info call with message starting with LOG_PREFIX_QUEUE_BUILD and containing feature_id=<x> repo=<y> correlation_id=<z> topic=pipeline.build-queued.<x> payload_bytes=<n>.
completion_promises.evidence: logger.info uses %s formatter with LOG_PREFIX_QUEUE_BUILD as the first arg. TestAC008LoggerInfo asserts exactly 1 record on logger 'jarvis.tools.dispatch' with all 5 documented key=value substrings. Pre-verified by Coach in Turn 1.
json.dumps of the documented five-key ack. TestAC009QueueBuildAck verifies key set, exact field values, and ISO-8601 parseable queued_at. Pre-verified by Coach in Turn 1.

subject = Topics.Pipeline.BUILD_QUEUED.format(feature_id=feature_id) used in both logger.info topic= field and ack['publish_target']. TestAC010Topic verifies expansion equals 'pipeline.build-queued.FEAT-J002'. Pre-verified by Coach in Turn 1.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Pydantic ValidationError caught at tool boundary → `ERROR: validation — <pydantic detail>` (ADR-ARCH-021).
completion_promises.evidence: Try/except around BuildQueuedPayload + MessageEnvelope construction; ValidationError → 'ERROR: validation — {first_error_msg}'. TypeError/ValueError fallback for non-string boundary inputs. TestAC011ValidationErrorBoundary uses func(feature_yaml_path=12345). Pre-verified by Coach in Turn 1.

All early-validation paths return error strings; pydantic + TypeError/ValueError caught around the constructor block; rest is pure data ops. TestAC012NeverRaises parametrises 4 invalid input shapes. Pre-verified by Coach in Turn 1.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Seam test: dispatches succeed end-to-end through assemble_tool_list-wired supervisor fixture; payload JSON round-trips through BuildQueuedPayload.model_validate_json.
completion_promises.evidence: TestAC013SeamContract (@pytest.mark.seam) verifies (a) LOG_PREFIX constants + _stub_response_hook contract from TASK-J002-007, (b) end-to-end queue_build.invoke({...}) returns parseable ack, (c) BuildQueuedPayload.model_validate_json round-trip equality, (d) MessageEnvelope.model_validate_json round-trip with EventType.BUILD_QUEUED. Pre-verified by Coach in Turn 1.

completion_promises.criterion_text: All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors.
completion_promises.evidence: Per pyproject.toml [tool.ruff] (line-length=100, target-version=py312, select=E,F,I,W,UP,B,SIM,RUF), executed `python -m ruff check src/jarvis/tools/dispatch.py tests/test_tools_queue_build.py` → 'All checks passed!' (zero errors). Then executed `python -m ruff format --check src/jarvis/tools/dispatch.py tests/test_tools_queue_build.py` → '2 files already formatted'. Turn 2 fixed 7 initial violations: 1×I001 (import sort, auto-fix), 1×RUF012 (added ClassVar[set[str]] to TestAC005AdapterValidation.ALLOWED), 4×UP017 (timezone.utc → datetime.UTC, auto-fix), 1×E501 (split 101-char assert across 3 lines). All 53 tests still pass post-fix.
